info.title: Modelgov API
info.description: Self-hosted AI policy gateway. Every completion is checked against budget, token, model-access, and safety policy before a provider is called.

bearerAuth.description: API key or operator token as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

get.description: Liveness — process is up. Does not touch the database.
Readiness — dependencies (DB, LiteLLM, Presidio) are reachable.
Current budget counters for a user and/or feature.
Aggregated request/cost summary from audit logs.
List recent request audit records (metadata only — no prompt content).
Get one request audit record by id (req_<number>). Metadata only.

post.description: Issue a new API key. The plaintext secret is returned once; only its hash is stored.

secret.description: Plaintext secret — shown once, never retrievable again.

get.description: List API keys (metadata only — never secrets or hashes).

post.description: Mint a new secret for an existing key; the old secret stops working immediately.

secret.description: Plaintext secret — shown once, never retrievable again.

get.description: Read the tamper-evident admin audit log (requires audit:read).
Re-walk the audit hash chain and report whether it is intact.

post.description: Erase a user's request-linked data (GDPR/CCPA). Requires data:erase.

get.description: List stored policy versions (metadata). Requires policy:read.

post.description: Validate and store a new (inactive) policy version. Requires policy:write.

get.description: Get the active policy version's metadata. Requires policy:read.

post.description: Validate a proposed policy and diff it against the active version WITHOUT saving. Requires policy:read.

get.description: Diff a stored version against another (?against=<id>) or the active version. Requires policy:read.

post.description: Activate a stored policy version (rollback = activate a prior id). Requires policy:write.
Dry-run policy evaluation. Returns the decision, resolved model, safety plan, and budget snapshot without calling LiteLLM or reserving budget.

tags.name: admin
tags.description: Key, audit, governance, and policy administration.
